core_mechanism: coupled-mode theory of evanescent energy exchange between two weakly-coupled propagating modes, whose coupling strength decays with separation, combined with exponential attenuation along the propagation path
brief_reason: The abstract's analytical framework rests on evanescent coupling described via coupled-mode theory plus in-waveguide propagation attenuation, i.e. distance-dependent leakage of energy between adjacent guided/free modes.
